source_pr.title: planner: fix data race in the TestLongBinaryPlan
source_pr.body:
Signed-off-by: Weizhen Wang <wangweizhen@pingcap.com>

<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:

2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close #39746

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

we should init logger first. next to init domain.
### Check List

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: Go race detector reports a data race in `TestLongBinaryPlan` caused by global logger/config initialization racing with background goroutines.
failure_signature: DATA RACE in `TestLongBinaryPlan` around `logutil.InitLogger(...)` and mock store background logging.
root_cause_explanation: `TestLongBinaryPlan` re-initializes global logging/config (`logutil.InitLogger(...)`) while a mock store created earlier may already have started background goroutines that log. That ordering can trigger concurrent access to global logger state and show up as a Go data race. The fix moves `CreateMockStore(...)` (and testkit/session setup) to happen after the logger initialization, so background goroutines start only after the global logger is configured, eliminating the race window.
fix_pattern: Avoid racing global logger/config init with background goroutines: initialize the logger first, then create the mock store / start background tasks.

evidence: evidence: planner: fix data race in the TestLongBinaryPlan
